name: Carol Davis
summary: Carol Davis is a neighborhood association president and environmental consultant running for City Council District 1.

track_record.claim: Led successful campaign to designate the District 1 waterfront as a protected green zone in 2024.

stated_positions.position: Growth is welcome when it includes community benefits agreements and environmental impact reviews.

notable_news.headline: Davis draws large crowd at District 1 town hall
notable_news.summary: Over 200 residents attended Davis's first town hall, focusing on waterfront development.
